Patrick Nommensen, Head of Strategic Initiatives at TikTok Shop, said the influx of larger brands onto the platform has not slowed growth for smaller sellers. About 58% of consumers who discovered a small brand on TikTok Shop subsequently purchased from that brand, with more than half completing the purchase within days and roughly one-fifth buying on the same day.
